5.  4 x 12 Banner Frame Hardware

# 4 x 12 Banner Frame Hardware

Transform your message into a captivating display with our Premium 4' x 12' Banner Frame Hardware. Designed for durability and ease of use, this sleek and sturdy frame is the perfect solution for showcasing your banners in a professional and eye-catching manner.

![4 x 12 Banner Frame Hardware](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/ebe0cb72-804e-4b4f-aebe-4c494bd3a254.jpg)

Product: 4 x 12 Banner Frame Hardware

Quantity:

(Min: 1, Max: 1000)

![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif)  
Loading product options...

 

Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) 

[Add to Cart](javascript:__doPostBack\('ctl00$ctl00$ctl00$MainBody$MainBody$MainContent$Loader$ctl01$ctl00$AddProductToCart',''\))

*   [How to Install](#42ffff4b-4232-4409-bf2a-86f22967719e)

### Banner Frames Hardware Production Times

At Banners.com, our production time ranges from seven to ten business days for our Banner Frame Hardware.

\*\*\* Orders approved after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. \*\*\*

**7-10 Business Day Standard**

This is our most popular turnaround option. Free and fast enough for most custom orders.

Please note: the time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as shipping time.

### Shipping Information

**This Product is made in our Minnesota Facility ONLY.**

We offer the following shipping methods:​

*   Standard (3-5 Business Days)
*   Three Day (3 Business Days)
*   Two Day (2 Business Days)
*   Overnight (1 Business Day)
*   Freight 

Shipping prices are determined by the weight of the package and the destination. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders and over-sized packages. If you are located outside of the Continental United States, please contact us for a shipping quote. 

**International shipping Notes:**

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

### How to Install a Lind Banner Frame

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
